applicationNote: Apply through the myNSFAS portal at www.nsfas.org.za before the national closing date.

additionalFunding.name: UWC Chancellor's Award
additionalFunding.criteria: Top matric results (85%+); APS 36+; all provinces

additionalFunding.name: UWC Merit Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: APS 30+; strong performance in relevant subjects

additionalFunding.name: UWC Sport Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: Western Province or national sport representative

additionalFunding.name: UWC Equity Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: Black, Coloured or Indian students; financial need assessment required
